findings.summary: Modules lack explicit __all__ exports for public API clarity
evidence: No __all__ declarations found in regicide_image_builder.py or dagger.py
findings.suggestion: Add __all__ = ['BuildVariant', 'TargetArch', 'BuildConfig', 'RegicideImageBuilder'] to explicitly declare public exports

findings.summary: Mixed naming conventions in test directories
evidence: Blind packet shows camelCase count of 25 in unit/ vs snake_case count of 169
findings.suggestion: Standardize test method names to snake_case following Python conventions

findings.summary: Inconsistent error message formatting across modules
evidence: Line 380 uses bare 'except:' while line 157 has explicit exception handling
findings.suggestion: Standardize error messages to include: operation context, error type, and actionable guidance

findings.summary: CLI command has 7+ parameters which approaches upper bound of acceptable complexity
evidence: build() function at line 403 has 7 parameters: target, variant, output, features, ai_optimization, reproducible, compress
findings.suggestion: Consider grouping related CLI options into a config object or using Typer's callback pattern

findings.summary: Optional dependencies like dagger are not clearly documented as optional
evidence: dagger.py imports 'import dagger' but pyproject.toml has no [project.optional-dependencies] section
findings.suggestion: Add optional dependency group in pyproject.toml and document that dagger is only needed for CI builds

findings.summary: Some test files are large (>300 LOC) which can reduce maintainability
evidence: test_regicide_image_builder.py is 430 lines, test_dagger.py is 352 lines
findings.suggestion: Consider splitting test files by feature area or using pytest markers to organize large test suites

findings.summary: build-system/tests/__init__.py has 100% comment ratio with minimal content
evidence: File content is exactly: '# Build system tests' - single comment line
findings.suggestion: Either remove the comment or add meaningful module documentation. An empty file is acceptable

findings.summary: Package uses flat layout instead of src/ layout which is recommended for modern Python projects
evidence: regicide_image_builder.py is directly in build-system/ without src/ subdirectory
findings.suggestion: Consider migrating to src/ layout to improve import handling and test isolation

findings.summary: Mixed async and sync patterns in some areas could be unified
evidence: build_image() at line 72 is async, but _get_total_memory_gb() at line 366 is sync despite doing I/O
findings.suggestion: Consider making all I/O-bound operations consistently async for better composability

findings.summary: Some functions have many optional parameters which increases cognitive load
evidence: BuildConfig dataclass has 7 fields with 3 having defaults (ai_optimization, reproducible, compress)
findings.suggestion: Consider using builder pattern or config objects for complex parameter sets

findings.summary: Some magic numbers remain in code despite MB/GB constants being added
evidence: Line 368: 'int(line.split()[1]) // MB' and Line 379: 'stat.free // GB' use division with constants
findings.suggestion: Extract remaining magic numbers into named constants at module level

findings.summary: build_image method has moderate cyclomatic complexity due to multiple conditional paths
evidence: build_image() method calls 8 different async methods with branching logic
findings.suggestion: Consider extracting build phases into separate methods to reduce cyclomatic complexity
